# House Conventions — crm-portal

_Generated by convention-learner on 2026-07-04. Re-run `/pilot-learn --conventions` after major refactors._

---

## Naming

### `<Solution>.<Layer>` project naming — enforced

**Pattern:** All .NET project names follow `<SolutionName>.<Layer>` (or `<SolutionName>.<Layer>.<Sublayer>`).
Layer tokens observed: `Api`, `Domain`, `Tests`.

**Evidence** (4 paths):
- `FullStack.sln` — solution named `FullStack`, defines the root namespace
- `src/FullStack.Api/FullStack.Api.csproj:7` — `<RootNamespace>FullStack.Api</RootNamespace>`
- `src/FullStack.Domain/FullStack.Domain.csproj` — project named `FullStack.Domain` (domain layer)
- `tests/FullStack.Api.Tests/FullStack.Api.Tests.csproj:7` — `FullStack.Api.Tests` mirrors source project

---

## Folder Layout

### Clean Architecture two-layer source tree — enforced

**Pattern:** Production code lives in `src/<SolutionName>.<Layer>/`. Test projects mirror source
projects under `tests/<SolutionName>.<Layer>.Tests/`. Infrastructure and SQL live in
dedicated top-level folders (`infra/`, `db/`).

**Evidence** (5 paths):
- `src/FullStack.Api/` — application layer (API + data access)
- `src/FullStack.Domain/` — domain layer, referenced by Api, references no framework packages
- `tests/FullStack.Api.Tests/` — integration tests for the Api project
- `infra/main.bicep` — infrastructure as code in its own top-level folder
- `db/seed.sql` — database seed scripts isolated from application code

---

## DI Registration

### Assembly-scanning registration — enforced

**Pattern:** Services are registered via assembly-scanning calls rather than explicit
per-type registrations. Validators, MediatR handlers, and Scrutor-based services are
registered with `RegisterServicesFromAssemblyContaining<Program>()` or equivalent.
No explicit `AddScoped<Interface, Impl>()` registrations for application services.

**Evidence** (3 paths):
- `src/FullStack.Api/Program.cs:17` — `builder.Services.AddMediatR(cfg => cfg.RegisterServicesFromAssemblyContaining<Program>())`
- `src/FullStack.Api/Program.cs:18` — `builder.Services.AddValidatorsFromAssemblyContaining<Program>()`
- `src/FullStack.Api/FullStack.Api.csproj:11-19` — MediatR, FluentValidation.AspNetCore present (scanning targets confirmed)

---

## Error Handling / Logging

### Serilog bootstrap-then-configure pattern — enforced

**Pattern:** Serilog is initialised as a bootstrap logger before `WebApplication.CreateBuilder`.
The full logger is then wired from `IConfiguration` via `UseSerilog`. This allows structured
log events during host startup before configuration is loaded.

**Evidence** (3 paths):
- `src/FullStack.Api/Program.cs:6-8` — `Log.Logger = new LoggerConfiguration().WriteTo.Console().CreateBootstrapLogger()`
- `src/FullStack.Api/Program.cs:12` — `builder.Host.UseSerilog((ctx, lc) => lc.ReadFrom.Configuration(ctx.Configuration))`
- `src/FullStack.Api/FullStack.Api.csproj:17` — `<PackageReference Include="Serilog.AspNetCore" Version="8.0.0" />`

---

## Test Conventions

### xUnit + NSubstitute + Mvc.Testing toolchain — enforced

**Pattern:** Tests use xUnit as the test framework, NSubstitute for mocking, and
`Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Testing` for integration test setup. No Moq or Autofac.TestFixture.

**Evidence** (3 paths):
- `tests/FullStack.Api.Tests/FullStack.Api.Tests.csproj:13` — `<PackageReference Include="xunit" Version="2.7.0" />`
- `tests/FullStack.Api.Tests/FullStack.Api.Tests.csproj:16` — `<PackageReference Include="NSubstitute" Version="5.1.0" />`
- `tests/FullStack.Api.Tests/FullStack.Api.Tests.csproj:18` — `<PackageReference Include="Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Testing" Version="8.0.4" />`

---

## Tentative Conventions

> ⚠ The following conventions have fewer than 3 evidence paths. They are listed for
> awareness but carry no enforcement weight. Re-run convention-learner after adding more
> source files to confirm or dismiss.

### Angular standalone components with signals-first state — tentative

**Pattern:** All Angular components use `standalone: true`. Reactive state uses `signal()`,
`computed()`, and `effect()` rather than RxJS `BehaviorSubject` or class properties.

**Evidence** (2 paths — needs more component files):
- `src/main.ts:1` — `bootstrapApplication(AppComponent, appConfig)` confirms standalone bootstrap
- `src/app/app.component.ts:6,15-17` — `standalone: true`; `signal()`, `computed()`, `effect()` all used

### EF Core migration `YYYYMMDD_<Description>` date-prefix naming — tentative

**Pattern:** Migration class names carry an 8-digit date prefix: `20240601_InitialCreate`.
This allows migrations to be sorted chronologically by name without relying on EF Core's
internal timestamp metadata.

**Evidence** (1 path — needs more migration files):
- `src/FullStack.Api/Migrations/20240601_InitialCreate.cs` — class `InitialCreate`, file date-prefixed
